test.name: Desafio 03: Atualizar o Post ID 1 (PUT)

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=sessao_independente, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 path_url=/posts/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '77', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": "1", "title": "Post Editado", "body": "Qualquer coisa", "userId": "1"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: Simula a edição de um post que já existe
